title: SequenceFile Entry Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory houses 'manifest/impl' which manages 'FileEntry' objects in SequenceFiles. 'EntryFileIO.java' implements Producer pattern, using a blocking queue and thread for writing. It interfaces with Hadoop's SequenceFile class for file management, employing multi-threading for efficient I/O. This component offers methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread for queuing and processing entries for writing.
